THEAPPRENTICE-APPRENTICE_STRIKE.title: Strike
THEAPPRENTICE-APPRENTICE_DEFEND.title: Defend
THEAPPRENTICE-PLAN.title: Plan
THEAPPRENTICE-PLAN.description: Draw {Cards:diff()} card. Choose up to {Select:diff()} cards in your hand. Apply [gold]Planned[/gold] to them.
THEAPPRENTICE-PLAN+.description: Draw {Cards:diff()} card. Choose up to {Select:diff()} cards in your hand. Apply [gold]Planned[/gold] to them.
THEAPPRENTICE-JUST_AS_PLANNED.title: Just as Planned
THEAPPRENTICE-JUST_AS_PLANNED.descriptio: [gold]Retain[/gold]. Play all [gold]Planned[/gold] cards in the order they were planned.
THEAPPRENTICE-JUST_AS_PLANNED+.descripti: [gold]Retain[/gold]. [gold]Innate[/gold]. Play all [gold]Planned[/gold] cards in the order they were planned.
THEAPPRENTICE-NEW_PERSPECTIVE.title: New Perspective
THEAPPRENTICE-NEW_PERSPECTIVE.descriptio: Discard all [gold]Unplayable[/gold] cards in your hand. Draw 1 per card discarded.
THEAPPRENTICE-NEW_PERSPECTIVE+.descripti: Discard all [gold]Unplayable[/gold] cards in your hand. Draw 1 per card discarded.
THEAPPRENTICE-CONTEMPLATE.title: Contemplate
THEAPPRENTICE-CONTEMPLATE.description: Gain {Block:diff()} block. Apply [gold]Planned[/gold] to a card in your hand.
THEAPPRENTICE-CONTEMPLATE+.description: Gain {Block:diff()} block. Apply [gold]Planned[/gold] to a card in your hand.
THEAPPRENTICE-CONTEMPLATE.selectionPromp: Choose a card to make Planned.
THEAPPRENTICE-REALIZE.title: Realize
THEAPPRENTICE-REALIZE.description: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage. Apply [gold]Planned[/gold] to a card in your hand.
THEAPPRENTICE-REALIZE+.description: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage. Apply [gold]Planned[/gold] to a card in your hand.
THEAPPRENTICE-REALIZE.selectionPrompt: Choose a card to make Planned.
THEAPPRENTICE-EPIPHANY.title: Epiphany
THEAPPRENTICE-EPIPHANY.description: Draw {Cards:diff()} card. Apply [gold]Planned[/gold] to a card in your hand.
THEAPPRENTICE-EPIPHANY+.description: Draw {Cards:diff()} cards. Apply [gold]Planned[/gold] to a card in your hand.
THEAPPRENTICE-EPIPHANY.selectionPrompt: Choose a card to make Planned.
THEAPPRENTICE-GROOVE.title: Groove
THEAPPRENTICE-GROOVE.description: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage for each [gold]Unplayable[/gold] card you have.
THEAPPRENTICE-GROOVE+.description: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage for each [gold]Unplayable[/gold] card you have.
THEAPPRENTICE-OVERTHINKING.title: Overthinking
THEAPPRENTICE-OVERTHINKING.description: Gain {Block:diff()} block for each [gold]Unplayable[/gold] card you have.
THEAPPRENTICE-OVERTHINKING+.description: Gain {Block:diff()} block for each [gold]Unplayable[/gold] card you have.
THEAPPRENTICE-CREATIVE_BLOCK.title: Creative Block
THEAPPRENTICE-CREATIVE_BLOCK.description: Gain {Block:diff()} block. If you have no [gold]Planned[/gold] cards, gain {Block:diff()} additional block.
THEAPPRENTICE-CREATIVE_BLOCK+.descriptio: Gain {Block:diff()} block. If you have no [gold]Planned[/gold] cards, gain {Block:diff()} additional block.
THEAPPRENTICE-REHEARSAL.title: Rehearsal
THEAPPRENTICE-REHEARSAL.description: Draw {Cards:diff()} cards. Choose up to 2 cards in your hand to apply [gold]Planned[/gold] to.
THEAPPRENTICE-REHEARSAL+.description: Draw {Cards:diff()} cards. Choose up to 3 cards in your hand to apply [gold]Planned[/gold] to.
THEAPPRENTICE-CLEAR_MIND.title: Clear Mind
THEAPPRENTICE-CLEAR_MIND.description: [gold]Exhaust[/gold] all [gold]Unplayable[/gold] cards. Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to all enemies for each.
THEAPPRENTICE-CLEAR_MIND+.description: [gold]Exhaust[/gold] all [gold]Unplayable[/gold] cards. Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to all enemies for each.
THEAPPRENTICE-TABULA_RASA.title: Tabula Rasa
THEAPPRENTICE-TABULA_RASA+.description: Remove [gold]Planned[/gold] from all cards. Draw 1 card.
THEAPPRENTICE-TRANSPOSE.title: Transpose
THEAPPRENTICE-TRANSPOSE.description: Select 2 cards. Transfer [gold]Planned[/gold] from one to the other.
THEAPPRENTICE-TRANSPOSE+.description: Select 2 cards. Transfer [gold]Planned[/gold] from one to the other. Draw {Cards:diff()} card.
THEAPPRENTICE-SIGNATURE.title: Signature
THEAPPRENTICE-PRELUDE.title: Prelude
THEAPPRENTICE-PRELUDE.description: Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold]. Draw {Cards:diff()} cards. Starts each combat [gold]Planned[/gold].
THEAPPRENTICE-PRELUDE+.description: Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold]. Draw {Cards:diff()} cards. Starts each combat [gold]Planned[/gold].
THEAPPRENTICE-SCHEMING.title: Scheming
THEAPPRENTICE-SCHEMING.description: At the start of your turn, choose a card in your hand to apply [gold]Planned[/gold] to.
THEAPPRENTICE-SCHEMING+.description: At the start of your turn, choose a card in your hand to apply [gold]Planned[/gold] to.
THEAPPRENTICE-SCHEMING.selectionPrompt: Choose a card to make Planned.
THEAPPRENTICE-IN_THE_ZONE.title: In the Zone
THEAPPRENTICE-IN_THE_ZONE.description: At the start of each turn, if you have [gold]Planned[/gold] cards, gain {Energy:diff()} Energy.
THEAPPRENTICE-IN_THE_ZONE+.description: At the start of each turn, if you have [gold]Planned[/gold] cards, gain {Energy:diff()} Energy.
THEAPPRENTICE-OBSESSION.title: Obsession
THEAPPRENTICE-OBSESSION.description: At the end of each turn, gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold] per [gold]Unplayable[/gold] card in your draw pile.
THEAPPRENTICE-OBSESSION+.description: At the end of each turn, gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold] per [gold]Unplayable[/gold] card in your draw pile.
THEAPPRENTICE-ENCORE.title: Encore
THEAPPRENTICE-ENCORE.description: Execute all [gold]Planned[/gold] cards. They keep their [gold]Planned[/gold] status.
THEAPPRENTICE-ENCORE+.description: Execute all [gold]Planned[/gold] cards. They keep their [gold]Planned[/gold] status.
THEAPPRENTICE-VIRTUOSO.title: Virtuoso
THEAPPRENTICE-VIRTUOSO.description: At the end of your turn, remove [gold]Unplayable[/gold] from all cards in your hand.
THEAPPRENTICE-VIRTUOSO+.description: At the [i]start[/i] of your turn, remove [gold]Unplayable[/gold] from all cards in your hand.
THEAPPRENTICE-MAGNUM_OPUS.title: Magnum Opus
THEAPPRENTICE-MAGNUM_OPUS.description: Choose up to {Cards:diff()} cards from your draw pile. Apply [gold]Planned[/gold] to them.
THEAPPRENTICE-MAGNUM_OPUS+.description: Choose up to {Cards:diff()} cards from your draw pile. Apply [gold]Planned[/gold] to them.
THEAPPRENTICE-MAGNUM_OPUS.selectionPromp: Choose cards from your draw pile to make Planned.
THEAPPRENTICE-DREAM.title: Dream
THEAPPRENTICE-DREAM.description: Gain {CalculatedBlock} [gold]Block[/gold] ({CalculationExtra:diff()} per [gold]Dream[/gold] in your deck). Become [gold]Unplayable[/gold].
THEAPPRENTICE-DREAM+.description: Gain {CalculatedBlock} [gold]Block[/gold] ({CalculationExtra:diff()} per [gold]Dream[/gold] in your deck). Become [gold]Unplayable[/gold].
THEAPPRENTICE-AMBITION.title: Ambition
THEAPPRENTICE-AMBITION.description: Deal {CalculatedDamage} damage ({ExtraDamage:diff()} per [gold]Ambition[/gold] in your deck). Become [gold]Unplayable[/gold].
THEAPPRENTICE-AMBITION+.description: Deal {CalculatedDamage} damage ({ExtraDamage:diff()} per [gold]Ambition[/gold] in your deck). Become [gold]Unplayable[/gold].
THEAPPRENTICE-POTENTIAL.title: Potential
THEAPPRENTICE-POTENTIAL.description: Deal {CalculatedDamage} damage ({ExtraDamage:diff()} per [gold]Ambition[/gold]) and gain {PotBlock} [gold]Block[/gold] ({PotBlockExtra:diff()} per [gold]Dream[/gold]). Become [gold]Unplayable[/gold].
THEAPPRENTICE-POTENTIAL+.description: Deal {CalculatedDamage} damage ({ExtraDamage:diff()} per [gold]Ambition[/gold]) and gain {PotBlock} [gold]Block[/gold] ({PotBlockExtra:diff()} per [gold]Dream[/gold]). Become [gold]Unplayable[/gold].
THEAPPRENTICE-NOCTURNE.title: Nocturne
THEAPPRENTICE-HUBRIS.title: Hubris
THEAPPRENTICE-HUBRIS.description: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage. Add 2 [gold]Ambitions[/gold] to your hand.
THEAPPRENTICE-HUBRIS+.description: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage. Add 2 [gold]Ambitions[/gold] to your hand.
THEAPPRENTICE-LONGING.title: Longing
THEAPPRENTICE-DRIVE.title: Drive
THEAPPRENTICE-DRIVE.description: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage. Add 3 [gold]Ambitions[/gold] to your hand.
THEAPPRENTICE-DRIVE+.description: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage. Add 3 [gold]Ambition+[/gold] to your hand.
THEAPPRENTICE-REVERIE.title: Reverie
THEAPPRENTICE-REVERIE.description: Add 4 [gold]Dreams[/gold] to your hand. Draw 1 card.
THEAPPRENTICE-REVERIE+.description: Add 4 [gold]Dream+[/gold] to your hand. Draw 1 card.
THEAPPRENTICE-SUBLIMATION.title: Sublimation
THEAPPRENTICE-SUBLIMATION.description: Exhaust all [gold]Unplayable[/gold] cards in your hand. For each, add 1 {AmbitionType}.
THEAPPRENTICE-SUBLIMATION+.description: Exhaust all [gold]Unplayable[/gold] cards in your hand. For each, add 1 {AmbitionType}.
THEAPPRENTICE-PASTICHE.title: Pastiche
THEAPPRENTICE-PASTICHE.description: Transform 1 card in your hand into a [gold]Potential+[/gold].
THEAPPRENTICE-PASTICHE+.description: Transform 1 card in your hand into a [gold]Potential+[/gold].
THEAPPRENTICE-PASTICHE.selectionPrompt: Choose a card to transform into Potential+.
THEAPPRENTICE-DRIVEN_INSPIRATION.title: Driven Inspiration
THEAPPRENTICE-DRIVEN_INSPIRATION.descrip: Add 1 [gold]Dream[/gold] and 1 [gold]Ambition[/gold] to your hand. Apply [gold]Planned[/gold] to a card in your hand.
THEAPPRENTICE-DRIVEN_INSPIRATION+.descri: Add 1 [gold]Dream[/gold], 1 [gold]Ambition[/gold], and 1 [gold]Potential[/gold] to your hand. Apply [gold]Planned[/gold] to a card in your hand.
THEAPPRENTICE-DRIVEN_INSPIRATION.selecti: Choose a card to make Planned.
THEAPPRENTICE-LULLABY.title: Lullaby
THEAPPRENTICE-LULLABY.description: At the start of each turn, add 1 [gold]Dream[/gold] to your hand.
THEAPPRENTICE-LULLABY+.description: At the start of each turn, add 1 [gold]Dream+[/gold] to your hand.
THEAPPRENTICE-CONVICTION.title: Conviction
THEAPPRENTICE-CONVICTION.description: At the start of each turn, add 1 [gold]Ambition[/gold] to your hand.
THEAPPRENTICE-CONVICTION+.description: At the start of each turn, add 1 [gold]Ambition+[/gold] to your hand.
THEAPPRENTICE-MANIFESTO.title: Manifesto
THEAPPRENTICE-MANIFESTO.description: Add 4 [gold]Ambitions[/gold] to your hand. Draw 1 card.
THEAPPRENTICE-MANIFESTO+.description: Add 4 [gold]Ambition+[/gold] to your hand. Draw 1 card.
THEAPPRENTICE-LUCIDITY.title: Lucidity
THEAPPRENTICE-LUCIDITY.description: Add 1 [gold]Dream+[/gold] to your hand. Upgrade all [gold]Dreams[/gold] in your hand.
THEAPPRENTICE-LUCIDITY+.description: Add 2 [gold]Dream+[/gold] to your hand. Upgrade all [gold]Dreams[/gold] in your hand.
THEAPPRENTICE-RESOLVE.title: Resolve
THEAPPRENTICE-RESOLVE.description: Add 1 [gold]Ambition+[/gold] to your hand. Upgrade all [gold]Ambitions[/gold] in your hand.
THEAPPRENTICE-RESOLVE+.description: Add 2 [gold]Ambition+[/gold] to your hand. Upgrade all [gold]Ambitions[/gold] in your hand.
THEAPPRENTICE-IGNITION.title: Ignition
THEAPPRENTICE-CHRYSALIS.title: Chrysalis
THEAPPRENTICE-CHRYSALIS.description: Exhaust all [gold]Dreams[/gold] and [gold]Ambitions[/gold] in your hand. For each, add 1 [gold]Potential[/gold] to your hand.
THEAPPRENTICE-CHRYSALIS+.description: Exhaust all [gold]Dreams[/gold] and [gold]Ambitions[/gold] in your hand. For each, add 1 [gold]Potential+[/gold] to your hand.
THEAPPRENTICE-DAYDREAM.title: Daydream
THEAPPRENTICE-DAYDREAM.description: Add 1 [gold]Dream[/gold] to your hand for each card in your hand.
THEAPPRENTICE-DAYDREAM+.description: Add 1 [gold]Dream[/gold] to your hand for each card in your hand. [gold]Retain[/gold].
THEAPPRENTICE-WUNDERKIND.title: Wunderkind
THEAPPRENTICE-WUNDERKIND.description: At the start of each turn, add 1 [gold]Dream+[/gold] and 1 [gold]Ambition+[/gold] to your hand.
THEAPPRENTICE-WUNDERKIND+.description: At the start of each turn, add 1 [gold]Dream+[/gold] and 1 [gold]Ambition+[/gold] to your hand.
THEAPPRENTICE-PRODIGY.title: Prodigy
THEAPPRENTICE-PRODIGY.description: When you play a [gold]Dream[/gold], add 1 [gold]Ambition[/gold]. When you play an [gold]Ambition[/gold], add 1 [gold]Dream[/gold].
THEAPPRENTICE-PRODIGY+.description: [gold]Innate[/gold]. When you play a [gold]Dream[/gold], add 1 [gold]Ambition[/gold]. When you play an [gold]Ambition[/gold], add 1 [gold]Dream[/gold].
THEAPPRENTICE-CONDUCTOR.title: Conductor
THEAPPRENTICE-CONDUCTOR.description: At the start of each turn, add 1 [gold]Potential[/gold] to your hand.
THEAPPRENTICE-CONDUCTOR+.description: At the start of each turn, add 1 [gold]Potential+[/gold] to your hand.
THEAPPRENTICE-BLUEPRINT.title: Blueprint
THEAPPRENTICE-BLUEPRINT.description: Add 1 [gold]Dream[/gold] and 1 [gold]Ambition[/gold] per [gold]Unplayable[/gold] card you have.
THEAPPRENTICE-BLUEPRINT+.description: Add 1 [gold]Dream+[/gold] and 1 [gold]Ambition+[/gold] per [gold]Unplayable[/gold] card you have.
